title: fix: make polly OpenAI-compatible with full param passthrough
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Polly speaks fluent OpenAI
gist.blurb: Our resident bee now fully complies with OpenAI API standards. She accepts all your parameters and returns proper token usage counts.
gist.summary: Updated the Polly model endpoint to return strictly OpenAI-compatible responses with full parameter passthrough and accurate token accumulation.
gist.impact: Developers can now use 'model: "polly"' in standard OpenAI client libraries without validation errors, with full control over temperature and other settings.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee integrating with standard protocols. A mix of the organic bee character and rigid technical standards (clipboards, checklists, server racks). The Nomnom creature represents the token usage tracking.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot wearing a tiny headset and holding a checklist next to a retro server rack. The server screen glows lime green (#ecf874) with '200 OK'. A small round nomnom creature happily eats a data token nearby. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic. Nostalgic but beautiful.
